headline: Choose the landing-page bundle that fits your launch
description: Buy 1, 5, or 10 AI landing pages with custom-domain access. Prices are based on EGP and converted to your selected currency.
dashboardDescription: Buy landing-page bundles, review available credits, and manage invoices.
localCurrencyDescription: Prices are based on EGP and converted to the selected country currency.
buyMoreCredits: Increase quantity to buy more landing page credits.
directWalletDescription: Enter the wallet phone number and Paymob will open the wallet confirmation page.
directWalletEgpOnly: Direct mobile wallet payments are currently available when EGP is selected.
walletPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid Egyptian wallet number.
